falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would contradict the 'bottom' pattern and invalidate the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume in the S&P 500 exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a breakout or shift in market dynamics, disproving the HOLD.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.5% and stays there for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp rise in bond yields would signal inflationary pressure or risk-on sentiment, invalidating the 'bottom' pattern.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
